issues.title: Image missing alt text
issues.description: Image is missing alternative text description.
issues.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text. For decorative images, use alt="" or aria-hidden="true".

issues.title: Missing language attribute
issues.description: The <html> element is missing a lang attribute.
issues.recommendation: Add a lang attribute to the <html> element (e.g., lang="en").

issues.title: No skip navigation link found
issues.description: Skip links help keyboard users bypass repetitive content.
issues.recommendation: Add a skip link at the beginning of the page: Skip to main content

issues.title: No language markup for non-Latin text
issues.description: Text in multiple languages should have language markup.
issues.recommendation: Add lang attribute to elements with different language content.

issues.title: Radio buttons not grouped in fieldset
issues.description: Related radio buttons should be grouped in a <fieldset> with <legend>.
issues.recommendation: Wrap radio button groups in <fieldset> and add descriptive <legend>.

issues.title: No ARIA live regions for dynamic updates
issues.description: Forms with dynamic feedback should use ARIA live regions.
issues.recommendation: Add elements with role="alert" or aria-live="polite" for form feedback.

issues.title: ARIA role without accessible name
issues.description: Elements with ARIA roles must have an accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Add text content or aria-label to elements with ARIA roles.

issues.title: Non-semantic element with click handler
issues.description: Using div/span with onclick is not keyboard accessible by default.

issues.title: Focus outline removed without replacement
issues.description: CSS removes focus outline but provides no visible focus indicator.
issues.recommendation: Keep focus outlines visible or replace with an alternative visible focus indicator.

issues.title: No client-side error handling detected
issues.description: Forms should provide suggestions when errors occur.
issues.recommendation: Implement client-side and server-side validation with helpful error messages and correction suggestions.

issues.title: Complex inputs missing help text
issues.description: Inputs with patterns, dates, or phone numbers need format guidance.
issues.recommendation: Add title, placeholder, or aria-describedby pointing to help text describing expected format.
